agent.title: Agent Runtimes
thread.title: Threads
thread.emptyHint: No recent threads. Select an agent above to start chatting.
thread.emptyDescription: Threads help you organize and track multiple agent conversations
chat.empty: Select a thread and send a message to start
chat.emptyTitle: What can I help you build today?
chat.emptyDescription: Select an agent above and send a message to start collaborating with AI agents
chat.runStatus.running: Handed off to {{agent}}. Current status: {{status}}. If this Runtime does not stream text, progress is mirrored in the run panel on the right.
chat.runStatus.completed: {{agent}} returned run status: {{status}}. The run panel on the right has full logs, tool calls, and file changes.
event.title: Events
event.emptyOffline: Start Edge Server to receive events
run.title: Run Detail
error.activeRunExists: This thread already has a running agent task. Opened the active run instead.
error.startRunFailed: Failed to start the agent run. Check Edge connectivity and agent authentication.
settings.title: Settings
settings.workModeDesc: Choose how much technical detail AgentHub shows while agents work.
settings.modeCodingDesc: Detailed replies, controls, output and sources.
settings.modeDailyDesc: The same power with fewer technical details.
settings.compactModeDesc: Use tighter spacing for dense project sessions.
settings.detailLevelDesc: Control how much of replies, run details, and sources are expanded by default.
settings.accountConnected: Hub sync is available for agents, threads and sessions.
settings.accountDisconnected: Sign in to sync agents, threads and sessions through Hub.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the theme used by the desktop client, settings, and run panels.
settings.autoReviewDesc: Let AgentHub review routine file access requests before asking you.
settings.fullAccessDesc: Allow agents to edit files and run network commands without extra approval.
settings.routingDesc: Use capability and availability to route tasks.
settings.configurationDesc: Configure the default agent, routing policy, and approval behavior.
settings.approvalModeDesc: Decide when file writes, commands, and network actions need confirmation.
settings.permissionsDesc: Control approval boundaries for file writes, shell commands, networking, remote control, and computer use.
settings.personalizationDesc: Manage display identity, default instructions, and local work preferences.
settings.instructionsDesc: Provide default preferences for local AgentHub sessions.
settings.personalizationNoteDesc: These preferences are stored in this desktop client first; Hub sync can extend them across devices.
settings.tasksDesc: Unify local session tasks, Hub tasks, remote device tasks, and agent run queues.
settings.taskSyncDesc: Sync task metadata through TokenDance ID while keeping execution authority on this device.
settings.taskInboxDesc: Show pending work from Desktop, Web, Android, and remote-control entry points.
settings.taskRunBindingDesc: Bind each task to an Agent Profile, Execution Target, run record, and artifacts.
settings.taskApprovalQueueDesc: Review remote triggers, file writes, shell commands, and computer-use approvals in one place.
settings.taskLocalRunsDesc: Runs currently known by Local Edge.
settings.taskHubBridgeDesc: Hub agent tasks bridged into local runs.
settings.taskHubBridgeSignedOut: Sign in to TokenDance ID to sync Hub tasks.
settings.taskLastRunDesc: No completed or active run is visible yet.
settings.taskRecentRunsDesc: Local Edge run records across projects and threads.
settings.taskNoRunsDesc: Start a run from the chat workspace to populate this queue.
settings.taskBridgeQueueDesc: Tasks dispatched from Hub, IM, Web, Android, or remote-control entry points.
settings.taskNoHubTasksDesc: Hub-dispatched agent tasks will appear here after TokenDance ID sync is connected.
settings.agentProfilesDesc: Compose Agent Profiles from Runtime, model, configuration, and execution target while keeping raw Runtime adapters visible as inventory.
settings.profileAvailableDesc: Local Edge Runtime adapters available for profile composition.
settings.profileRuntimeCoverageDesc: Runtime health comes from the Edge runner inventory.
settings.runtimeInventoryDesc: Runtime adapters reported by Local Edge; these are not user-managed Agent Profiles yet.
settings.runtimeDefaultDesc: Local Runtime adapter reported by Edge.
settings.profileCompositionDesc: Agent Profiles will bind one Runtime to a model, configuration bundle, workspace context, skills, MCP policy, and execution target.
settings.localProfileDesc: Local profile composed from Runtime, model route, configuration sources, and execution target.
settings.profileRuntimeDesc: Codex, OpenCode, Claude Code, or another CLI/SDK adapter selected as the execution engine.
settings.profileModelDesc: Concrete model, alias mapping, reasoning effort, provider fallback, and cc-switch policy.
settings.profileConfigDesc: AGENTS.md, memory, context, chat history, working directory, skills, MCP servers, and approval policy.
settings.profileExecutionTargetDesc: Local Edge, Hub Relay, SSH/Tailscale target, Cloud Edge, or another remote execution location.
settings.profileConfigSourceDesc: Profiles will merge AGENTS.md, memory, context, chat history, working directory, skills, MCP, model parameters, and approval policy.
settings.profilePublishDesc: Reserve TokenDance ID backed profile sync, versioning, sharing, and Agent Market publishing.
settings.noProfilesDesc: Connect Local Edge so AgentHub can compose profiles from available Runtime adapters.
settings.noRuntimesDesc: Start Local Edge to load Codex, OpenCode, Claude Code, and future custom Runtime adapters.
settings.executionTargetsDesc: Choose where runs execute: local device, remote Edge, cloud Edge, SSH/Tailscale host, or Hub relay target.
settings.targetLocalEdgeDesc: Runs execute on this machine through the local Edge server and CLI runtimes.
settings.targetHubRelayDesc: TokenDance Hub routes remote approvals, device sync, and cross-device dispatch.
settings.targetSshDesc: Reserve remote hosts, SSH profiles, Tailscale devices, and per-target safety policies.
settings.targetCloudEdgeDesc: Reserve managed cloud execution targets for scheduled and remote tasks.
settings.runnerInventoryDesc: Edge is reachable, but no runner inventory is currently exposed by health checks.
settings.onlineImDesc: Manage Hub online sessions, contacts, device presence, and agent collaboration messages.
settings.onlineImSessionsDesc: Reuse the existing IM view, then add search, grouping, and session sync.
settings.onlineImPresenceDesc: Aggregate desktop, web, and mobile presence from Hub device and WebSocket events.
settings.onlineImNotificationsDesc: Reserved for friend requests, agent completion, permission requests, and mentions.
settings.groupChatDesc: Support mixed human and agent rooms, collaborative threads, agent mentions, and channel-level task dispatch.
settings.enableGroupChatDesc: Allow Hub conversations to place contacts, devices, and Agent Profiles in the same collaboration room.
settings.groupChatAgentsDesc: Mention agents or route work to the right Agent Profile by task type.
settings.groupChatRoomsDesc: Create TokenDance Hub rooms by project, team, device, or task stream.
settings.groupChatModerationDesc: Record agent calls, file access, model routing, and human approvals inside rooms.
settings.agentSchedulingDesc: Schedule agents by Runtime, model, Execution Target, queue priority, and safety policy.
settings.enableAgentSchedulingDesc: Allow AgentHub to choose the best local, remote, or cloud execution target.
settings.schedulerQueueDesc: Merge local prompts, Hub tasks, remote-control jobs, and automations.
settings.schedulerPolicyDesc: Route by cost, latency, context length, model health, and cc-switch state.
settings.schedulerRemoteDesc: Reserve SSH, Tailscale, Hub Relay, and Cloud Edge registration and health checks.
settings.schedulerQueueLiveDesc: Local Edge runs plus Hub bridge tasks visible to the scheduler.
settings.schedulerProfilesDesc: Available Agent Profiles from the local Edge registry.
settings.schedulerTargetsDesc: Local Edge, Hub Relay, remote hosts, and Cloud Edge readiness.
settings.schedulerPolicyReadyDesc: Model mapping, cc-switch, approval, and remote-control signals.
settings.schedulerLiveQueueDesc: Runs and Hub tasks the scheduler can currently reason about.
settings.schedulerNoQueueDesc: Start a local run or receive a Hub task to populate the scheduler queue.
settings.schedulerRouteLocalDesc: Runs on this device through local Runtime adapters.
settings.schedulerRouteHubDesc: Dispatches work from TokenDance Hub to signed-in devices.
settings.schedulerRouteRemoteDesc: Reserved for SSH, Tailscale devices, and remote Edge agents.
settings.schedulerRouteCloudDesc: Reserved for hosted execution targets and elastic task dispatch.
settings.schedulerPolicyModelMappingDesc: Resolve aliases and per-agent model defaults before dispatch.
settings.schedulerPolicyCcSwitchDesc: Use provider health, quota, and operator notes for fallback routing.
settings.schedulerPolicyRemoteDesc: Gate remote starts, approvals, and device handoff before execution.
settings.schedulerPolicyApprovalDesc: Apply local permission rules before tools, files, commands, or remote actions.
settings.schedulerGuardDesc: Scheduling chooses Agent Profile, model, and Execution Target; Runtime streaming, tool calls, and file edits remain basic run capabilities.
settings.agentMarketDesc: Reserve entry points for agent templates, capability tags, ratings, and release review.
settings.agentTemplatesDesc: Package CustomAgent presets and launch templates by task type.
settings.agentCapabilityTagsDesc: Use capability tags for search, routing, and market filtering.
settings.agentReviewFlowDesc: Check permissions, tool allowlists, model policy, and safety notes before publishing.
settings.marketLocalProfilesDesc: Local Edge Runtime adapters that can seed future Agent Profile templates.
settings.marketPublishReadyDesc: Available local profiles that can become marketplace templates after review.
settings.marketCapabilitiesDesc: Distinct Runtime capabilities available for future marketplace templates.
settings.marketHubSyncDesc: TokenDance ID session is ready for profile sync and marketplace review.
settings.marketHubSyncSignedOut: Sign in with TokenDance ID to sync and publish profiles.
settings.marketInstalledProfilesDesc: Runtime adapters available locally; packaging them as Agent Profiles requires configuration and review.
settings.marketNoProfilesDesc: Start Local Edge to discover Codex, OpenCode, Claude Code, or custom Runtime adapters.
settings.marketReleaseReadinessDesc: Checklist for turning a local Agent Profile into a reviewed TokenDance marketplace entry.
settings.marketTokenDancePublishDesc: Reserve Hub-side ownership, versioning, review workflow, and install analytics.
settings.marketGuardDesc: Agent Market publishes Agent Profiles and configuration packages; Runtime adapters stay local capability providers until explicitly packaged.
settings.marketProfileDefaultDesc: Local Edge profile available for template packaging.
settings.keyboardDesc: Common conversation, composer, and navigation shortcuts.
settings.mcpDesc: Manage local and remote MCP servers so agents can call tools safely.
settings.enableMcpDesc: Allow AgentHub to discover and invoke configured MCP tools in sessions.
settings.mcpFilesystem: Allow controlled reads from the current workspace.
settings.mcpGitHub: Connect to read repositories, issues, and pull requests.
settings.mcpRuntimeSupportDesc: Local Edge reports which Runtime adapters can expose MCP tools.
settings.mcpPermissionHooksDesc: Runtimes that can gate MCP/tool access through local approval hooks.
settings.mcpSubAgentSpawnDesc: Runtimes that can launch delegated agents through their adapter.
settings.mcpHubSyncDesc: TokenDance ID can sync reviewed server indexes while local config stays authoritative.
settings.mcpHubSyncSignedOut: Sign in with TokenDance ID before syncing MCP server indexes.
settings.mcpRuntimeMatrixDesc: MCP availability belongs to Agent Runtime adapters; Profiles decide when to use it.
settings.mcpNoRuntimesDesc: Start Local Edge or install a Runtime adapter before enabling MCP tools.
settings.mcpRuntimeDefaultDesc: Local Runtime adapter reported by Edge.
settings.mcpTemplatesDesc: Configuration templates are reserved until a real server config is connected.
settings.mcpTokenDanceHubDesc: Reserve reviewed MCP server indexes, org policy, and cross-device sync.
settings.mcpRemoteServerDesc: Reserve SSH, Tailscale, and cloud-hosted MCP endpoints with per-target policy.
settings.mcpGuardDesc: This page reflects Runtime support from Local Edge plus reserved server templates; it does not claim a server is connected until configuration and policy are both present.
settings.skillsDesc: Manage local skills, project skills, sync sources, and review status.
settings.skillSyncDesc: Sync reusable skill indexes after Hub sign-in while keeping local overrides first.
settings.skillLocalRegistryDesc: Project skills live inside the workspace in a platform-neutral location.
settings.skillReviewDesc: Review triggers, permission boundaries, scripts, and external dependencies before use.
settings.skillReviewReadyDesc: Skills with local metadata ready for use or sync review.
settings.skillScriptsDesc: Skills that include executable helper scripts and need script-level review.
settings.skillHubSyncDesc: TokenDance ID session can sync indexes while local overrides remain first.
settings.skillHubSyncSignedOut: Sign in with TokenDance ID to sync reusable skill indexes.
settings.skillInstalledDesc: Repository-local skills available to AgentHub agents in this workspace.
settings.skillGovernanceDesc: Local registry, script audit, references, and Hub sync boundaries.
settings.skillScriptAuditDesc: Executable helpers require permission and dependency review before use.
settings.skillReferencesDesc: Reference material bundled with project skills.
settings.skillGuardDesc: This page reflects the committed project skill registry; Hub sync and remote marketplace installation remain separate flows.
settings.skill.adapterDevDesc: SOP for developing and debugging Agent CLI adapters.
settings.skill.devLoopDesc: ROADMAP-driven long-running development loop with subagent coordination.
settings.skill.envSandboxDesc: Environment filtering and sensitive variable handling for agent subprocesses.
settings.skill.integrationTestDesc: Integration E2E workflow for Edge, agent runtimes, and WebSocket events.
settings.skill.prePushDesc: Pre-push verification checklist for build, tests, coverage, lint, and E2E.
settings.skill.testCoverageDesc: Test and coverage analysis workflow for identifying weak areas.
settings.skill.uiScreenshotDesc: Desktop UI screenshot automation for visual QA and competitor comparison.
settings.hooksDesc: Run project scripts before and after agent runs for checks, audits, or sync.
settings.enableHooksDesc: Allow this workspace to register pre-run and post-run automation.
settings.hookPreRun: Check workspace state and permissions before a run.
settings.hookPostRun: Collect outputs, tests, and summaries after a run.
settings.modelsDesc: Configure default models, reasoning effort, provider fallback, and cost/latency preferences.
settings.modelDefaultDesc: Auto-select by agent, task type, and availability.
settings.modelDefaultProviderDesc: Prefer TokenDance Relay, direct providers, or cc-switch local routing before a run is dispatched.
settings.modelReasoningDesc: Keep reasoning controls in the prompt composer and run request.
settings.modelProviderFallbackDesc: Later use Hub and cc-switch health to degrade automatically.
settings.modelLocalGuardDesc: These preferences are persisted in this desktop client first; Hub sync and Edge request injection remain explicit follow-up steps.
settings.modelMappingDesc: Map aliases like sonnet, opus, and haiku to concrete models and providers.
settings.enableModelMappingDesc: Resolve aliases, policies, and defaults before dispatching a task.
settings.modelAliasDesc: Map team shorthand to concrete models and reasoning parameters.
settings.modelPolicyDesc: Later support project, agent, cost, latency, and context-window overrides.
settings.ccSwitchDesc: Reserve cc-switch provider health, quota, failure reason, and fallback management.
settings.ccSwitchBridgeDesc: Read provider status and available models from cc-switch for routing decisions.
settings.ccSwitchProvidersDesc: Show account health, expiry reason, quota, and operator notes.
settings.ccSwitchHealthDesc: Feed check results into model mapping and agent routing.
settings.connectionsDesc: Review Hub, Edge, and realtime channel connectivity.
settings.remoteControlDesc: Manage remote devices that can start agent tasks, inspect runs, and hand work to this machine.
settings.remoteControlEnableDesc: Only signed-in devices can dispatch controlled agent tasks through Hub.
settings.remoteControlApprovalDesc: Remote writes, commands, and computer-use actions must pass this device's policy.
settings.remoteControlDevicesDesc: Later manage authorization by TokenDance ID device, platform, and recent activity.
settings.gitDesc: Control branch detection, commit conventions, and code change display.
settings.autoDetectGitDesc: Read branch, remote, and uncommitted changes when opening a workspace.
settings.environmentDesc: Local command, runtime, and desktop shell configuration.
settings.environmentNodeDesc: Used for frontend development, tests, and builds.
settings.environmentTauriDesc: Desktop shell and local capability bridge.
settings.worktreeDesc: Manage isolated development directories and the default workspace location.
settings.worktreeIsolationDesc: Create separate worktrees for risky or long-running tasks.
settings.browserDesc: Configure web previews, screenshot verification, and browser automation.
settings.browserPreviewDesc: Allow AgentHub to open previews and screenshot checks for local frontends.
settings.computerUseDesc: Control confirmation policy for desktop-level actions.
settings.computerConfirmDesc: Require explicit confirmation before clicking, typing, or switching windows.
settings.computerUseGuardDesc: Deletion, payment, credentials, and system settings always require human confirmation.
settings.platformsDesc: Unify Desktop, Web, Android, and macOS state, identity, tasks, and settings.
settings.platformSyncDesc: Use Hub to sync account, devices, session metadata, and agent task state.
settings.platformMacosDesc: Tauri desktop shell with native windows and liquid-glass settings.
settings.platformWindowsDesc: Current primary development platform covering Edge, Desktop, and Playwright verification.
settings.platformAndroidDesc: Planned mobile console focused on IM, approvals, remote control, and notifications.
settings.platformWebDesc: Planned lightweight access for agent market, remote sessions, and quick reviews.
settings.accountDesc: Sign in to Hub to sync agents, threads, and settings.
settings.tokenDanceIdDesc: TokenDance ID is the unified identity entry point for Hub, devices, agent market, and cross-device sync.
settings.hubSessionDesc: Hub-issued session is available for IM, task bridge, device sync, and future profile sync.
settings.hubSessionSignedOutDesc: Sign in before using Hub IM, remote control, task bridge, or cross-device sync.
settings.tokenDanceSessionDesc: This session came from TokenDance ID and is mapped to a Hub product session.
settings.tokenDanceOidcPendingDesc: OIDC authorization can open with PKCE state, but callback capture and Hub token exchange are still being wired.
settings.desktopDeviceDesc: Stable local device id used for Hub device registration and remote task routing.
settings.desktopDeviceMissingDesc: Device id is created during Hub login or device registration.
settings.identityBoundaryDesc: TokenDance ID proves who you are; Hub session, device proof, and AgentHub permissions decide what this client may do.
settings.hubSessionCapabilityDesc: Hub session authorizes client APIs such as contacts, sessions, task bridge, and device registration.
settings.tokenDanceOidcDesc: Desktop currently stores PKCE state and opens the authorization URL; automatic callback capture and code exchange remain pending.
settings.authTokenSourceDesc: Shows whether the active Hub token came from local Hub login or the TokenDance ID path.
settings.deviceProofDesc: Future remote starts and approvals must pair the Hub session with a registered desktop device.
settings.accountGuardDesc: Desktop stores only the Hub-issued session and local device id. Third-party provider tokens belong to TokenDance ID, not AgentHub Desktop.
settings.authPolicyDesc: Finish OIDC callback, aud/issuer validation, refresh tokens, device revocation, and session audit.
settings.syncScopeDesc: Currently syncs account, connection state, and recoverable session metadata.
settings.securityAuditDesc: Collect audit trails for permissions, tool calls, remote control, model routing, and credential access.
settings.auditTrailDesc: Keep local events for critical actions, then sync them to Hub audit logs.
settings.permissionLedgerDesc: Record tool calls, file writes, commands, and remote-control decisions.
settings.secretScanDesc: Detect credential leaks in agent output, diffs, and logs.
settings.securityGuardDesc: Unwired remote capabilities stay off by default; high-risk actions require local confirmation and traceable logs.
settings.archivedDesc: View and restore archived project conversations.
settings.noArchivedDesc: Archived conversations will appear here for restore or cleanup.

welcome.subtitle: Run AI coding agents locally

welcome.localEdgeReady: Ready on this desktop through Local Edge.
welcome.runtimeDefaultDesc: Local Runtime adapter reported by Edge.
welcome.profileDesc: Runtime, model route, config sources, and execution target are composed before dispatch.

welcome.suggestion3: Explain the architecture of this project

im.input.enterHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
im.message.empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!
im.message.sendFailed: Failed to send. Click to retry.
auth.title: AgentHub
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! Please log in.
auth.tokenDancePrimary: Recommended for Hub sync, devices, agent permissions, and future cross-device identity.
auth.tokenDanceCallbackPending: TokenDance ID authorization opened. PKCE state is stored; callback capture and token exchange are still being wired.
auth.error.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.error.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.error.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and Hub URL.
auth.error.registerFailed: Registration failed. Username may be taken.
auth.error.tokenDanceUnavailable: TokenDance ID sign-in is temporarily unavailable.
status.hubClickToLogin: Click to log in to Hub
